# Golden Hands Massage & Spa

> Traditional Khmer massage and spa in Kampot, Cambodia — riverside, directly opposite Brown Coffee. Family-run, every therapist personally trained by owner Reaksa. Fixed prices in USD, from $3 waxing touch-ups to a $43 signature four-hands massage.

Golden Hands Massage & Spa is a family tradition of Khmer massage carried forward by owner Reaksa in Kampot, Cambodia. The space was recently renovated into a calm, upscale spa (not a hotel spa, not a roadside massage shop) welcoming both Kampot locals and travelers. All treatments follow traditional Khmer technique, taught by Reaksa to every therapist on the team.

## Site sections
- [Our Story](https://goldenhands.massage-kampot.com/#about): background on Reaksa and the spa
- [Treatments & Prices](https://goldenhands.massage-kampot.com/#menu): full massage, face & body, waxing, and combo package menu
- [Our Hands](https://goldenhands.massage-kampot.com/#team): the therapist team
- [Visit Us](https://goldenhands.massage-kampot.com/#visit): location, hours, phone, map
- [Book a Massage](https://goldenhands.massage-kampot.com/#booking): online booking request form

## Business details
- Location: Riverside, Kampot, Cambodia — directly opposite Brown Coffee
- Hours: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM, daily
- Online bookings: from the next day onward only (no same-day online booking), in 30-minute slots from 10:00 AM to 9:00 PM (last start time). Call directly for same-day requests.
- Phone / WhatsApp: +855 12 847 747, +855 81 328 278
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/golden.hands.kampot/
- Signature treatment: Apsara Four Hands Massage — two therapists working in synchrony, 60 min $30 / 90 min $43

## Team
- Reaksa — Owner & Therapist, carries her family's lineage in traditional Khmer massage and trains every therapist on the team
- Chanmey — Foot, Neck & Back
- Somnang — Oil Massage, Face Treatments, Neck & Back
- Kunthea — Full Body, Khmer Traditional, Pedicure
- Kanha — Khmer Yoga Massage, Aloe Vera Cream Massage
- Muy — Aroma Massage & Face, Head Massage, Foot & Back Relaxation
- Lisa — Traditional Khmer Massage, Deep Tissue Massage
- Neang (also known as SreyNeang) — Foot SPA Treatment, Facial Massage
- Rath — Therapist

## Treatment menu (USD)

### Massage & Spa
- Traditional Khmer Massage — 60m $12 · 90m $17 · 120m $22
- Khmer Yoga Massage — 60m $14 · 90m $20 · 120m $26
- Traditional Khmer Oil Massage — 60m $15 · 90m $21 · 120m $28
- Back & Shoulder Oil Massage — 30m $8 · 60m $14
- Aroma Massage & Face — 60m $19 · 90m $26
- Aromatherapy Oil Massage — 60m $18 · 90m $25
- Deep Tissue Massage — 60m $22 · 90m $31
- Apsara Four Hands Massage (signature) — 60m $30 · 90m $43
- Aloe Vera Cream Massage — 60m $18 · 90m $25
- Warm Oil Massage — 60m $19 · 90m $26
- Hot Stone Massage — 90m $30 · 120m $38
- Head Massage — 30m $6 · 60m $11
- Foot Relaxation Massage — 30m $4 · 60m $7
- Foot & Back Relaxation Massage — 30m $9 · 60m $12
- Full Legs Relaxation Massage — 60m $10

### Face & Body
- Facial Massage — $18
- Traditional Khmer Body Scrub — $18
- Aroma Salt Body Scrub — $14
- Manicure Treatment — $6 (men) / $8 (women)
- Pedicure Treatment — $6 (men) / $8 (women)
- Foot SPA Treatment — $20

### Waxing
- Eyebrows — $3
- Lip — $3
- Under Arm — $5
- Half Legs — $15
- Full Legs — $25
- Back — $15
- Bikini — $20

### Combo Packages
- $48 — Aroma Salt Body Scrub + Aromatherapy Oil Massage + Facial Massage
- $50 — Aroma Salt Body Scrub + Aromatherapy Oil Massage + Foot SPA Treatment
